questions.subject: Current Affairs
questions.prompt: The 'al-Udeid Air Base', recently in the news due to regional tensions, is located in which of the following countries?
questions.explanation: The al-Udeid Air Base is located in Qatar and is the largest American military base in West Asia.
questions.takeaway: Qatar hosts the largest US air base in the Middle East, making it a focal point in regional geopolitics.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: Iran launched missile attacks at the al-Udeid Air Base in Qatar, the largest American base in West Asia.
